responses.english: At the end on the left.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprite, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah ah-PREE-teh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy fresh produce in this market
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trovano i banchi di frutta e verdura qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see troh-VAH-noh ee BAN-kee dee FROOT-tah eh ver-DOO-rah kwee?

responses.english: Inside, in the central section of the market.
responses.phonetic: al-leen-TER-noh, NEL-lah seh-TSYOH-neh chen-TRAH-leh del mer-KAH-toh.
responses.local: All'interno, nella sezione centrale del mercato.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat at the market
phrases.text_local: Scusi, si può mangiare qualcosa al mercato?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, see PWOH man-JAH-reh kwal-KOH-zah al mer-KAH-toh?

responses.english: Yes, on the upper floor there are food stalls.
responses.phonetic: see, al PYAH-noh soo-peh-ryoh-reh chee SOH-noh stand gas-troh-NOH-mee-chee.
responses.local: Sì, al piano superiore ci sono stand gastronomici.
